thresholdComparisons.threshold: value < 1,000 msgs/sec | 1,000 <= value < 10,000 msgs/sec | value >= 10,000 msgs/sec

rationale: Borderline for kafka:broker1:9092 — no static signal resolves est-peak-msgs-sec for this repo; defaulting to Plain SQL, FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED pending a corpus/usage estimate or `postgres-advisor analyze --live`. Evidence: .env:3.
postgresEquivalent: Plain SQL, FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED

rationale: Borderline for memcached:memcached — no static signal resolves est-ops-per-sec for this repo; defaulting to UNLOGGED table + pg_cron TTL sweep pending a corpus/usage estimate or `postgres-advisor analyze --live`. Evidence: docker-compose.yml:5.
